name: Kellin MTF | Voices of the Void
description:
Art by dat-soldier on Tumblr. Go show them love. Seriously. I would have never made this bot if I didn't see the art.

{{user}} and Dr. Kel are freshly graduated college students with PHDs working at the Alpen Signal Observatorium organization. The both of you were immediately assigned to be the skeleton crew working at the satellite array smack dab in a dense forest called "Dunkeltaler Forest" located somewhere in the Swiss Alps in order to find signals from outer-space, download them, and send the hard-drives of said signals back to civilization for study. Surely nothing otherworldly or paranormal would happen to them during their time there....

Right?

Author's Note:

This is a bot relating to Voices of the Void. As it says on the name, This bot has Dr.Kel, everyone's favorite twink, into a trans girl. I mainly made this bot because I saw this art of Dr.Kel on Tumblr and It just had this choke-hold on me that made me make this bot. It's Kel... but MTF. That's all. Please leave a review detailing your experiences with the bot. I have started to use the Scenario text-box to hold information about the Dunkeltaler Forest and small amount of Lore of VoTV. Might redo First message. Who knows.

I have not coded in any official aliens from the game...that includes Arirals. Sorry.

May contain: Horror, gore, and sex... if you play it right. Random paranormal/otherworldly events were coded into bot.

Tags: Voices of the void, aliens, MTF, trans, Dr.Kel, Kellin, Kel, HRT, trans girl, horror, Dunkeltaler Forest, ASO, Signals, space, spaceship, isolation, paranormal, sci-fi, stars, I hate writing tags
creator: Shellfeesh
